name: nemous
description: Nemous plugin marketplace — plugins by Nemous for Claude Code

plugins.name: f67
plugins.description: F67 — AI Development Operating System: Domain Driven Memory, 12 specialized pipeline agents, 13 /f67-* lifecycle commands, and reusable workflow artifacts.

plugins.name: nemohire
plugins.description: NemoHire — AI-powered hiring copilot: builds a persistent professional identity, sources jobs (or takes any jobs file), and applies to them via sequential browser automation — in your own voice, submitted automatically once every question is answered — tracks every application, and syncs hiring emails.
